name: Delicious Dirt
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven and bake the sugar-free Devil's Food cake according to package directions until set.
2. Allow the baked cake to cool completely in the pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat together 8 ounces of low-fat cream cheese, 1/4 pound (or 4 oz) of margarine, and 3 1/2 cups of skim milk until smooth.
4. Mix in 2 sugar-free chocolate pudding packets, stirring until well combined.
5. Gently fold in the prepared sugar-free whipped topping until fully incorporated.
6. Crush the 20 dark, sugar-free cookies into fine crumbs using a food processor or rolling pin.
7. Sift the cookie crumbs over the top of the cooled cake and gently press them down to distribute evenly.
Note: Do not rush the cooling process; allow the cake to cool completely before adding the frosting and cookie crumbs for best results.
